aesthetic: Cyber/Security Threat Intel, SOC Dashboard, Forensic Analysis

headings.usage: Marketing landing page hero headings, main dashboard page titles.

metrics_and_data.usage: FPS counters, latency, probability percentages, REAL/FAKE verdict, table data, timestamps.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Tactical Minimalism. Use sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). Panels should use bg-white/5 (or similar Tailwind opacity) with a 1px solid border of border-white/10. No soft drop shadows; rely on crisp 1px borders to separate elements.
visual_enhancers.textures: Incorporate a subtle CRT scanline effect (using CSS repeating-linear-gradient) or grain noise overlay over the webcam/video feed area to emphasize the 'forensic tool' aspect.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use subtle neon glows on critical indicators (e.g., REAL/FAKE verdict badges) using drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,59,48,0.5)] for threats.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Reserved ONLY for floating elements like sticky headers or modal popups: use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a crisp inner border. Do not use for standard cards.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: Mode B (High Density Grid). Use dense, compact spacing (gap-4). Example: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12. The main webcam/video feed should take priority (e.g., col-span-8), surrounded by smaller metric widgets (col-span-4).
grids_and_layouts.landing_page: Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetric blocks with generous negative space (py-24, py-32) and large typography.

components.buttons: Tactical and sharp. Minimal padding, 1px solid border. Hover states should slide-in a background color or invert text/bg. No pill shapes.
components.gauges_and_charts: Use Recharts for waveforms, timelines, and fake probability gauges. Color code strictly: Red (#FF3B30) for Fake > 50%, Green (#00E676) for Real < 50%.
components.tables: Dense rows for detection history. Use monospace font for numerical columns and hashes. Apply border-collapse with subtle border-b border-white/10.
components.badges: REAL/FAKE final verdict badge should be high-contrast: text-white bg-red-600/20 border border-red-500 for Fake, and equivalent green for Real.

motion.telemetry: Live update counters should have a very subtle Framer Motion color flash or number scramble effect on value change.
motion.status: Include a blinking 'Live' or 'REC' dot (animate-pulse) next to the webcam feed.
motion.page_transitions: Instant or very fast (0.15s ease-out) to mimic a high-performance terminal UI.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on dark panels passes WCAG AA. Red and Green accents must be lightened appropriately when used as text.
accessibility.prefers_reduced_motion: Disable pulsing and flashy telemetry animations if user prefers reduced motion.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

landing_hero_bg.description: SOC analyst in dark room. Use as background for the landing page hero with a heavy bg-black/70 to bg-black/90 gradient overlay.

facial_recognition_demo.description: Woman with laser scan overlay. Use as a dummy placeholder for the live webcam feed or video upload detection panel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON carefully. This is a cyber-security threat intel dashboard, not a generic SaaS app.
Install Tailwind CSS, configure custom colors in tailwind.config.js matching the hex codes provided.
Import Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Install 'recharts' for the analytics page and dashboard gauges.
Build a layout with a Sidebar navigation for the dashboard.
Implement the landing page with the 'landing_hero_bg' image, large Outfit typography, and a clear CTA to the Google login screen.
For the main dashboard, mock the webcam component using 'facial_recognition_demo' image. Overlay a CSS-based bounding box or scanning line using Framer Motion to simulate real-time detection.
Implement rich data visualizations using JetBrains Mono for all numeric values (FPS, latency ms, Fake Probability %).
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements like buttons, inputs, and tabs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid the generic 'AI slop' aesthetic. DO NOT use generic purple-violet-on-white gradients.
Do NOT use pure black as a gradient; use it as a solid background or with subtle noise textures.
Create depth through 1px crisp borders and contrasting background opacities (bg-white/5), not soft drop shadows.
Do NOT apply 'transition: all'. Target specific properties (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform).
Do NOT center align the app container in CSS.
Never use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs.
Do NOT use transparent dropdown backgrounds; ensure all floating components have solid or heavily blurred dark backgrounds.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭) for icons. Use proper SVG icon libraries.
